name: POS - Sell Stock from another Outlet
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can improve sales opportunities and customer satisfaction through selling stock from another outlet in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " POS, which enables completing sales using inventory located at different store locations. This multi-location selling capability helps retail operators prevent lost sales from local stockouts, with effective cross-outlet selling typically improving customer satisfaction and optimizing inventory utilization across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Selling from another outlet in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to leverage network-wide inventory visibility and fulfill customer needs using stock from any location, helping ensure sales completion and customer satisfaction. This multi-location capability helps ensure your retail operations can maximize sales opportunities while providing customers with access to your complete inventory regardless of local stock availability."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/482-pos-sell-stock-from-another-outlet#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "FAQs and related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On occasion you may experience a situation where a customer would like to purchase a product that's not in stock at your current store. Using the Retail Express POS "}, {"text": "Look Up"}, {"text": " feature, you can search for the products to find out where they're in stock."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In addition to that, POS will even let you create a sale immediately using the stock from the other location."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this article:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/482-pos-sell-stock-from-another-outlet#common-terms", "children": [{"text": "Common Terms"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/482-pos-sell-stock-from-another-outlet#video-overview", "children": [{"text": "Video Overview"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/482-pos-sell-stock-from-another-outlet#create-sale", "children": [{"text": "Creating a sale to sell stock from another outlet"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/482-pos-sell-stock-from-another-outlet#transfer-icons", "children": [{"text": "Transfer icons"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By creating the sale at POS Retail Express will automatically:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Allocate", "bold": true}, {"text": " the stock in the other store to the sale (preventing staff from selling the stock)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reduce the "}, {"text": "Available ", "bold": true}, {"text": "stock level for that Outlet"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create an "}, {"text": "Internal Transfer Order ", "bold": true}, {"text": "(ITO) - the mechanism to transfer the stock from that location to your outlet"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "During this process there are two terms for the outlets that you should become familiar with."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Prerequisite: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "The process for selling stock from another outlet uses the Advanced Search feature in POS. Refer to the "}, {"text": "POS - Advanced Search"}, {"text": " article for more information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Common Terms"}], "data-id": "common-terms"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When selling stock from another store there are terms used to describe each store:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Term", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Source Location"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The location where the stock is being transferred from"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fulfilment Location"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The location where the stock is dispatched from"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-bdb62b0e"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open "}, {"text": "POS", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a Sale", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for a product using the "}, {"text": "Advanced Search ", "bold": true}, {"text": "feature"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Outlet ", "bold": true}, {"text": "filter to search across multiple stores"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To select stock from another outlet click the "}, {"text": "+ ", "bold": true}, {"text": "sign from the outlet you would like to take stock from, or clicking in the "}, {"text": "Qty ", "bold": true}, {"text": "column and entering a value"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Add Items", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Process the rest of the sale as normal"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Refer to the section on "}, {"text": "ITO management"}, "children": [{"text": "Transfer icons"}], "data-id": "transfer-icons"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When stock has been added to the sale from another outlet, there are two key changes to the appearance of the sale in POS:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The items will be added to the sale with a "}, {"text": "Truck ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon ", "bold": true}, {"text": "in front of the product description - this indicates that the product is being sourced from another outlet, and that an Internal Transfer Order (ITO) has been created in the system"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppWBHEA2.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppWBHEA2.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pos_order_descriptiontruckicon.PNG"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Fulfilment Icon ", "bold": true}, {"text": "on the far left side of the product row has been changed from a Cash & Carry icon to a Pickup icon. This icon signifies the product will be collected by the customer at a future date. Naturally, this product cannot remain with the cash & carry icon as the product has not yet arrived into the store, and the customer is unable to take the product with them."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppW1hEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppW1hEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pos_order_fulfilmentmethodfulfil.PNG"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information?
